calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-27-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Guillermo Sanchez.
Dept. 514. Judge: Newton Lam. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

David V. Marcolini, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Federal Credit Union.
William Cooper, Collections Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Guillermo Sanchez.
Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint for Breach of Contract/Money Lent was filed on November 14, 2018, and personally served on defendant Guillermo Sanchez on December 18, 2018.
Default as to defendant Guillermo Sanchez was entered on March 14, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, June 27, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff San Francisco Federal Credit Union, and against the Defaulted Defendant Guillermo Sanchez, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $190,577.19.
Prejudgment Interest - $28,040.43.
Attorney Fees - $3,600.00.
Costs - $530.00.

Total - $222,747.62.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2019 Continued To Aug-07-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2019 Continued To May-01-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
